**Somogy** ([Hungarian](/wiki/Hungarian_language "Hungarian language"): *Somogy vármegye*, pronounced [[ˈʃomoɟ]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Hungarian "Help:IPA/Hungarian"); [Croatian](/wiki/Croatian_language "Croatian language"): *Šomođska županija*; [Slovene](/wiki/Slovene_language "Slovene language"): *Šomodska županija*, [German](/wiki/German_language "German language"): *Komitat Schomodei*) is an administrative county ([comitatus](/wiki/Counties_of_Hungary "Counties of Hungary") or *vármegye*) in present Hungary, and also in the former [Kingdom of Hungary](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Hungary "Kingdom of Hungary").

Somogy County lies in south-western Hungary, on the border with [Croatia](/wiki/Croatia "Croatia")'s [Koprivnica-Križevci](/wiki/Koprivnica-Kri%C5%BEevci_County "Koprivnica-Križevci County") and [Virovitica-Podravina](/wiki/Virovitica-Podravina_County "Virovitica-Podravina County") counties. It stretches between the river [Dráva](/wiki/Dr%C3%A1va "Dráva") and the southern shore of [Lake Balaton](/wiki/Lake_Balaton "Lake Balaton"). It shares borders with the Hungarian counties of [Zala](/wiki/Zala_County "Zala County"), [Veszprém](/wiki/Veszpr%C3%A9m_(county) "Veszprém (county)"), [Fejér](/wiki/Fej%C3%A9r "Fejér"), [Tolna](/wiki/Tolna_(county) "Tolna (county)"), and [Baranya](/wiki/Baranya_(county) "Baranya (county)"). Somogy is the most sparsely populated county in Hungary. The county capital is [Kaposvár](/wiki/Kaposv%C3%A1r "Kaposvár"). Its area is 6,036 km2.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Somogy_County&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

Main article: [Somogy County (former)](/wiki/Somogy_County_(former) "Somogy County (former)")

Somogy was also the name of a historic administrative county ([comitatus](/wiki/Comitatus_(Kingdom_of_Hungary) "Comitatus (Kingdom of Hungary)")) of the [Kingdom of Hungary](/wiki/Kingdom_of_Hungary "Kingdom of Hungary"). Its territory, which was slightly larger than that of present Somogy County, is now in south-western Hungary. The capital of that county was also [Kaposvár](/wiki/Kaposv%C3%A1r "Kaposvár").

### Ethnicity

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Somogy_County&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Ethnicity")]

Besides the Hungarian majority, the main minorities are the Roma (approx. 16,000), Germans (3,000) and Croats (1,500).

Total population (2011 census): 316,137  
Ethnic groups (2011 census):[[4]](#cite_note-4)
Identified themselves: 287,692 persons:

* [Hungarians](/wiki/Hungarians "Hungarians"): 265,464 (92,27%)
* [Romani](/wiki/Romani_people_in_Hungary "Romani people in Hungary"): 16,167 (5,62%)
* [Germans](/wiki/Germans_of_Hungary "Germans of Hungary"): 3,039 (1,06%)
* Others and indefinable: 3,022 (1,05%)

:   Approx. 46,000 persons in Somogy County did not declare their ethnic group at the 2011 census.
